findings.description: skills/autopilot/SKILL.md:155 and L306 still refer to 'reviews/round-N/' for the convergence durability checkpoint path. This contradicts the code (convergence_loop.py:264) and docs/parallel-agentic-development.md, which correctly use '.review-cache/round-N/' per the C2 fix in 84cbdbb.

checkpoint_findings.py:82 catches (OSError, ValueError) but misses TypeError. json.dump raises TypeError for non-serializable objects (e.g. set, custom classes). A TypeError during the write sequence would still leak a .tmp file, partially defeating the C7 hygiene fix in 1468358.

checkpoint_findings.py:73 docstring contains a stale line-number reference: 'the load-bearing durability is the file-level fsync at line 73'. Following the try/except addition for C7, the fsync call shifted to line 81.
